description: Basic RapiDoc web component embed example

code.html:
<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script type="module" src="https://unpkg.com/rapidoc/dist/rapidoc-min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <rapi-doc
        spec-url="https://petstore3.swagger.io/api/v3/openapi.json"
        theme="dark"
        render-style="read"
        show-header="false"
    ></rapi-doc>
</body>
</html>

notes: The minimum required attribute is spec-url pointing to a valid OpenAPI 2.0 or 3.x specification.
